dataset.name: GLHYMPS
dataset.description: GLHYMPS global hydrogeology dataset prepared for GeoNinja lookup

source.citation: Huscroft, J., Gleeson, T., Hartmann, J., & Börker, J. (2018). Compiling and mapping global permeability of the unconsolidated and consolidated Earth: GLobal HYdrogeology MaPS 2.0 (GLHYMPS 2.0). Geophysical Research Letters, 45.doi: 10.1002/2017GL075860
source.license_note: Licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC-BY 4.0). Redistribution and creation of derived products are permitted, provided appropriate credit is given to the original authors and source.

processing.modifications: reproject_to_epsg_4326; fix invalid geometries (buffer0, best effort)set 7801 hydraulic conductivity vals to NaN where permeability >= 1 m/s
